content: We can reframe the ICM curiosity mechanism to actively prune and prioritize encoding of only high-novelty state representations into an agent’s limited working memory, creating a resource allocation loop that preserves working memory capacity for high-stakes reasoning while still driving exploratory learning. This means ICM does not just generate intrinsic reward for exploration—it can act as a built-in gatekeeper that prevents working memory overflow from low-information mundane observations.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
